overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring giant holographic koi fish swimming between neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera moves smoothly through rain-soaked streets, capturing vibrant reflections of billboards and building lights on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown street with holographic displays

events.description: giant blue holographic koi fish enters the frame from the left, swimming toward center

agents.ego_description: cruising slowly through the wet city street, observing the giant orange holographic fish swimming overhead

entered.detail: giant glowing orange koi fish with flowing fins swimming in the air between buildings
large digital billboard displaying an astronaut helmet image
tall building with grid-patterned windows and vertical neon lighting
cluster of dark towers with colorful neon signage
rain-soaked street surface reflecting neon lights and holograms

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a wet cyberpunk city street at night, dominated by a massive orange holographic koi fish swimming overhead. Neon billboards and illuminated skyscrapers line both sides of the street, their vibrant colors reflecting off the rain-soaked asphalt. A blue holographic fish enters from the left, adding to the surreal atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor between high-rise commercial towers

events.description: orange holographic fish exits frame right as blue fish becomes the dominant visual element
camera pans slightly left to track the blue fish as it swims across the skyline

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street while tracking the blue holographic fish swimming from left to right

entered.detail: giant glowing blue and white koi fish with bioluminescent flowing fins

segments.scene_description: The blue holographic koi takes center stage as the orange fish swims away, gliding gracefully between the neon-lit towers. The camera pans slightly to follow the luminous blue creature as it moves across the dark skyline, with the central skyscraper shifting to the right of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown cyberpunk street with floating holographic art installations

events.description: orange holographic fish re-enters the frame from the left side
blue holographic fish returns to the left side of the frame as the orange fish exits right

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the downtown corridor as the holographic fish cycle through their animation patterns overhead

entered.detail: orange koi fish swimming back into view from the left
blue koi fish re-entering the frame at the end of the segment

segments.scene_description: The orange holographic fish returns, swimming majestically from left to right across the frame as the camera continues through the neon canyon. Toward the end of the segment, the blue fish reappears on the left while the orange fish exits, creating a continuous cycle of luminous marine life swimming through the urban night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk canyon where massive holographic koi fish cycle through the neon-lit skyline. It begins by gliding down a wet city street dominated by a giant orange holographic fish swimming overhead, with vibrant billboards reflecting off the dark asphalt. As the orange fish swims away, the camera pans slightly to follow a luminous blue koi that takes center stage, gliding gracefully between the towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts as the orange fish returns to swim majestically across the frame, while the central architecture drifts to the right. Finally, the blue fish reappears on the left just as the orange one exits, completing a seamless loop of ethereal marine life drifting through the urban night.
